prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A handsome young male protagonist with extremely high attractiveness, delicate facial features, and clear smooth skin. He has chestnut brown long hair flowing gently, piercing clear eyes with a gentle and melancholic gaze, refined facial structure with soft jawline. Wearing a light blue elegant trench coat over simple dark clothing, silver earrings catching subtle light, slender graceful physique with an ethereal presence. His expression shows a tender smile mixed with thoughtful melancholy, embodying both vulnerability and quiet strength. The character has an otherworldly quality fitting for someone who can resonate with dream memories. Full-body character design, standing centered against pure white background, painted in impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations, visible brushstrokes creating atmospheric depth. No text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
